TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Pidemak to fodawan faco ni Wufong == Pidemak to fodawan faco ni Wufong sanay o naitiniay i 1988 miheca 12 folad 31 romi'ad, mapatirengay ka'ayaw no cilamalay no Ciayi a fodawan faco ni Wufong, mapolin no URM (Urban-Rural Mission) onto no yicumin a demakan. Wufong, pirocok to sowal o nano "pacayatay" no Mancin i kasaniyaro' no Cayi itiya, o sasowalen o mihongyakoay tamdaw, kasasowalan to sakicitodongay. Pikowan no Dipong to Taywan itiya to sapi "palatamdaw a satao'" i, nonini ci Wufong tamdaw a nidemakan palakawasen nanay, mala o mipalasawaday to tatiih no Cozoku a militangalay saka mikinafalahay to tireng a tadamaanay tamdaw hanto. Padoedo o papotalay Congko komintang ko mikowanay to Taywan itiya i, o sapilaheciaw to "palatamdaw (keihatsu)" to yincumin pisafaloco', oya nisakawasan a demak ni Wufong, pacomoden i tilid no kaemangay, oya kamaro'an no Cozoku finawlan a ngangan palaWufongsiangen. Oya kasakapot no sangasaw i Ciayi patireng to odawan faco ni Wufong, mapatireng i ka'ayaw syataw no Ciayi, kalo pica'engawan no tamdaw o "kahorak mingodo" yo sanay. O sakadademak no micalapay mikowan ato pisakakinih to ponka ko ni Wufong a pisakawas, palemangahen no mikowanay o mikinafalahay to tireng sanay palakawas ci Wufongan koya fodawan faco, o sapioning to kacingangan no yincumin, milokes ato miepecay to yincumin ato ponka konini a kacipinang a silosi; saka o makataray, mifolaway, komaenay to remes ko finacadan no yincumin sanay. I 1980 miheca macakat to ko harateng no yincumin to sakacinikapolongan a Taywan, matapi'elalay, nanoya micowat to ko onto no yincumin. Mi'oningay to yincumin a nisakawasan ci Wufongan a likisi kahinapecen to no hakasi ato yincuminco salongoc a yofayof, onini sakawasan Wufong malopakayraan a miliyang no yincumin. I 1988 miheca 12 folad, o patodongan nonini a paratohay onto (Urban-Rural Mission, URM) o "Pikihar to maepecay safaay finacadan ato lawacay tamdaw a ma'oripay, o olah ato caayay ko nifolawan pidemak, nai finawlanay sarikec, milaheciay to saka mo'ecel ato nipitelek no niyah a syakay", itini i Kopi kiwkay a Sinhua no Taynan minanam saka 9 lekad a konling, mikihatiyaay minanam saheto o dingtosi no yincumin ato mitiliday no Yusan sinkakoing. Pasifanaay singsi ira ci Zheng Guozhong aci Lin Zongzheng i "pilaheci to demak no syakay" a kasasowalen, ira ko picecayay a mitiliday to sinkakoing ci Pasuya Tiakiana painiay to itiraay ka'ayaway no cilamalay siataw no Ciayi a fodawan faco ni Wufong, pipeleng to nisakawasan a Wufong sarocoday a pidemak, malokaainian no pinanam. Toya dafak i 12 folad 31 romi'ad romi'ad, o nikeridan ni Lin Zongzheng foksi a minanamay no URM, tayra i ka'ayaway no cilamalay siataw no Ciayi a fodawan faco ni Wufong. O nipidemak nai ci Lin Zongzheng foksi ko misa'osiay to kapolongan nitelek no yincumin a "Pidemak to fodawan faco ni Wufong" demak no pihapiw. Sa'ayaway a pidemak i tanetek k katomirengan noya fodawan 'efa, caay kafilo tarohen koya fodawan. Itiya to i saka tosa ko pitaroh a demak, oya Bunun a tamdaw ci Kavas Takistaulan aci Danav Pakikeli mikalic nai koror ni 'Amis a tamdaw ci Masao Nikar, macakat i katomirengan noya fodawan ni Wufong a mirotarotay, oya roma a kapot o Cozoku tamdaw ci Pasuya Tiakiana, Bunun tamdaw ci Tiang Qulmutan, Paiwan tamdaw ci Ripun, Ngedrel, Chen Xiongshu aci DremdremanTjausunug, Tayal tamdaw ci Tuau Yugehai, Laysa Akyo aci Yukuy Watan, ato ci Lin Zongzheng, Huang Zhaokai, Dai Zhenyao, Liu Fengsong, Zhan Yihua, Chen Wenzhi, Zeng Junren, Pan Jianer, Huang Lingna, 30 tamdaw ko padamaat itiya. malaheci na Kavas Takistaulan aci Danav Pakikeli ko pirotarot to wa'ay no 'efa a fodawan, sefat hananayto to waya i tangal no 'efa, oya parakatay to paliding midamaay a matayalay no mincintan ci Zeng Junren ko mitarohay itiya, nanoya laheci sanayto mapolin koya fodawan. Ikor nonini a demak, ci Lin Zongzheng ato papinapina mikihatiyaay tonini a demak mapakokso, nika ikor to malasawaday ko kacirarawan. Minanamay no URM, saki demak toni a fodawan faco ni Wufong o katatahican no yincumin ato Payrang a pidemak, saki kalekatepan saki sinkako pitooran a demak. iraay ko "malekapotay harateng" itira tonini ka'ayaw siataw no cilamalay, pacelak pahapinang to misamangahan no micalapay mikowan to sapipakadit to yincumin a kawasan a demak, kao mo'ecelay ko sapiliyang to mitekeday sakowan pakayni i pidemak ato kiwiko ko piepec ato pisamsam to yincumin a so'elinay demak. O pidemak to fodawan faco ni Wufong o pahapinangay to so'elinay, midemakay to mo'ecelay, kasasingodo no finacadan, patireng to kalali'ay no demak. Pakayni i demak no fodawan faco ni Wufong ko pihapiw no finawlan no Tayan, o nika eca nangra i caayay ko mo'ecelay ko demak no citodongay mirayray to likisi koni. ikor to pidemak toni a fodawan faco ni Wufong a komintang sifo saka, o paci'cian ko pipaca'of to nilahaan no yincumin, saka tosa miheca oya Koli pinyikowan palasawadan to nai sapikiwiko koya kimad ni Wufong, oya salaloma'an citodongay (Nicenpo) nao "Wufongsiang" falican pala "Alisansiang" sanay to. O ninianan ko nihaydaan no citodongay mikowan itiya to pasimo'ecelay harateng ko pasayraan. Patireng to mangahay likisi ato palakawasan a Wufong mapolin ato mapeleng to, matiya o kapacek ni Yis Kristo i ciwcika, mapeleng ko kalalaedan no yincumin ato Payrang, kasasi'ada a padal. Mapalasawad ko fodawan ni Wufong saka pasayra i malacecayay ko yincumin ato Payrang, matiya kalekapot no malikakaay a aro'. Pakayni pidemak no URM, mihapiw ko ciwlo kiwkay, o mamidoedo ko kiwkay to pipasifana' ni Yis to ratoh no Kawas, mihayda to ma'epecay a ilawacay tamdaw, mapaoningay ngangan a yincumin, macefisay salongoc lakapot no finawlan, malakapot a romakat. O sasowalen to pilaheciaw no Taywan Kristo iwlo kiwkay to "kiwkay…. o palali'ayay a matahidang, … mihayda to polong no finawlan, pakayni piolah ato kafades, malakacipinangan no pafaloco'an" a demak no wacay a mitoor o sanay a "Pidemak to fodawan faco ni Wufong". Mitiliday ci Chen Nanzhou Mifalicay ci Masao Nikar
S.PHON: == piɬ~ɮəmak to~u fo~uɬ~ɮawan faʦo~u ni wo~u~ufo~uŋ == piɬ~ɮəmak to~u fo~uɬ~ɮawan faʦo~u ni wo~u~ufo~uŋ sanaj o~u naitiniaj i **** miħəʦa ** fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, mapatirəŋaj kaʡajaw no~u ʦiɾamaɾaj no~u ʦiaji a fo~uɬ~ɮawan faʦo~u ni wo~u~ufo~uŋ, mapo~uɾin no~u o~u~urm (o~u~urb~b~van-ro~u~uraɾ missio~un) o~unto~u no~u jiʦo~u~umin a ɬ~ɮəmakan. wo~u~ufo~uŋ, piro~uʦo~uk to~u so~uwaɾ o~u nano~u "paʦajataj" no~u manʦin i kasanijaro~uʡ no~u ʦaji itija, o~u saso~uwaɾən o~u miħo~uŋjako~uaj tamɬ~ɮaw, kasaso~uwaɾan to~u sakiʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj. piko~uwan no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ to~u tajwan itija to~u sapi "paɾatamɬ~ɮaw a satao~uʡ" i, no~unini ʦi wo~u~ufo~uŋ tamɬ~ɮaw a niɬ~ɮəmakan paɾakawasən nanaj, maɾa o~u mipaɾasawaɬ~ɮaj to~u tatiiħ no~u ʦo~u*o~uko~u~u a miɾitaŋaɾaj saka mikinafaɾaħaj to~u tirəŋ a taɬ~ɮamaanaj tamɬ~ɮaw ħanto~u. paɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~u o~u papo~utaɾaj ʦo~uŋko~u ko~umintaŋ ko~u miko~uwanaj to~u tajwan itija i, o~u sapiɾaħəʦiaw to~u "paɾatamɬ~ɮaw (kəiħatso~u~u)" to~u jinʦo~u~umin pisafaɾo~uʦo~uʡ, o~uja nisakawasan a ɬ~ɮəmak ni wo~u~ufo~uŋ, paʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮən i tiɾiɬ~ɮ no~u kaəmaŋaj, o~uja kamaro~uʡan no~u ʦo~u*o~uko~u~u finawɾan a ŋaŋan paɾawo~u~ufo~uŋsiaŋən. o~uja kasakapo~ut no~u saŋasaw i ʦiaji patirəŋ to~u o~uɬ~ɮawan faʦo~u ni wo~u~ufo~uŋ, mapatirəŋ i kaʡajaw sjataw no~u ʦiaji, kaɾo~u piʦaʡəŋawan no~u tamɬ~ɮaw o~u "kaħo~urak miŋo~uɬ~ɮo~u" jo~u sanaj. o~u sakaɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəmak no~u miʦaɾapaj miko~uwan ato~u pisakakiniħ to~u po~unka ko~u ni wo~u~ufo~uŋ a pisakawas, paɾəmaŋaħən no~u miko~uwanaj o~u mikinafaɾaħaj to~u tirəŋ sanaj paɾakawas ʦi wo~u~ufo~uŋan ko~uja fo~uɬ~ɮawan faʦo~u, o~u sapio~uniŋ to~u kaʦiŋaŋan no~u jinʦo~u~umin, miɾo~ukəs ato~u miəpəʦaj to~u jinʦo~u~umin ato~u po~unka ko~unini a kaʦipinaŋ a siɾo~usi; saka o~u makataraj, mifo~uɾawaj, ko~umaənaj to~u rəməs ko~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan no~u jinʦo~u~umin sanaj. i **** miħəʦa maʦakat to~u ko~u ħaratəŋ no~u jinʦo~u~umin to~u sakaʦinikapo~uɾo~uŋan a tajwan, matapiʡəɾaɾaj, nano~uja miʦo~uwat to~u ko~u o~unto~u no~u jinʦo~u~umin. miʡo~uniŋaj to~u jinʦo~u~umin a nisakawasan ʦi wo~u~ufo~uŋan a ɾikisi kaħinapəʦən to~u no~u ħakasi ato~u jinʦo~u~uminʦo~u saɾo~uŋo~uʦ a jo~ufajo~uf, o~unini sakawasan wo~u~ufo~uŋ maɾo~upakajraan a miɾijaŋ no~u jinʦo~u~umin. i **** miħəʦa ** fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ, o~u pato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋan no~unini a parato~uħaj o~unto~u (o~u~urb~b~van-ro~u~uraɾ missio~un, o~u~urm) o~u "pikiħar to~u maəpəʦaj safaaj finaʦaɬ~ɮan ato~u ɾawaʦaj tamɬ~ɮaw a maʡo~uripaj, o~u o~uɾaħ ato~u ʦaajaj ko~u nifo~uɾawan piɬ~ɮəmak, nai finawɾanaj sarikəʦ, miɾaħəʦiaj to~u saka mo~uʡəʦəɾ ato~u nipitəɾək no~u nijaħ a sjakaj", itini i ko~upi kiwkaj a sinħo~u~ua no~u tajnan minanam saka * ɾəkaɬ~ɮ a ko~unɾiŋ, mikiħatijaaj minanam saħəto~u o~u ɬ~ɮiŋto~usi no~u jinʦo~u~umin ato~u mitiɾiɬ~ɮaj no~u jo~u~usan sinkako~uiŋ. pasifanaaj siŋsi ira ʦi *ħəŋ *o~u~uo~u*ħo~uŋ aʦi ɾin *o~uŋ*ħəŋ i "piɾaħəʦi to~u ɬ~ɮəmak no~u sjakaj" a kasaso~uwaɾən, ira ko~u piʦəʦajaj a mitiɾiɬ~ɮaj to~u sinkako~uiŋ ʦi paso~u~uja tiakiana painiaj to~u itiraaj kaʡajawaj no~u ʦiɾamaɾaj siataw no~u ʦiaji a fo~uɬ~ɮawan faʦo~u ni wo~u~ufo~uŋ, pipəɾəŋ to~u nisakawasan a wo~u~ufo~uŋ saro~uʦo~uɬ~ɮaj a piɬ~ɮəmak, maɾo~ukaainian no~u pinanam. to~uja ɬ~ɮafak i ** fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, o~u nikəriɬ~ɮan ni ɾin *o~uŋ*ħəŋ fo~uksi a minanamaj no~u o~u~urm, tajra i kaʡajawaj no~u ʦiɾamaɾaj siataw no~u ʦiaji a fo~uɬ~ɮawan faʦo~u ni wo~u~ufo~uŋ. o~u nipiɬ~ɮəmak nai ʦi ɾin *o~uŋ*ħəŋ fo~uksi ko~u misaʡo~usiaj to~u kapo~uɾo~uŋan nitəɾək no~u jinʦo~u~umin a "piɬ~ɮəmak to~u fo~uɬ~ɮawan faʦo~u ni wo~u~ufo~uŋ" ɬ~ɮəmak no~u piħapiw. saʡajawaj a piɬ~ɮəmak i tanətək k kato~umirəŋan no~uja fo~uɬ~ɮawan ʡəfa, ʦaaj kafiɾo~u taro~uħən ko~uja fo~uɬ~ɮawan. itija to~u i saka to~usa ko~u pitaro~uħ a ɬ~ɮəmak, o~uja b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un a tamɬ~ɮaw ʦi kab~vas takistao~u~uɾan aʦi ɬ~ɮanab~v pakikəɾi mikaɾiʦ nai ko~uro~ur ni ʡamis a tamɬ~ɮaw ʦi masao~u nikar, maʦakat i kato~umirəŋan no~uja fo~uɬ~ɮawan ni wo~u~ufo~uŋ a miro~utaro~utaj, o~uja ro~uma a kapo~ut o~u ʦo~u*o~uko~u~u tamɬ~ɮaw ʦi paso~u~uja tiakiana, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un tamɬ~ɮaw ʦi tiaŋ *o~u~uɾmo~u~utan, paiwan tamɬ~ɮaw ʦi ripo~u~un, ŋəɬ~ɮrəɾ, ʦħən xio~uŋsħo~u~u aʦi ɬ~ɮrəmɬ~ɮrəmantjao~u~uso~u~uno~u~u*, tajaɾ tamɬ~ɮaw ʦi to~u~uao~u~u jo~u~u*əħai, ɾajsa akjo~u aʦi jo~u~uko~u~uj watan, ato~u ʦi ɾin *o~uŋ*ħəŋ, ħo~u~uaŋ *ħao~ukai, ɬ~ɮai *ħənjao~u, ɾio~u~u fəŋso~uŋ, *ħan jiħo~u~ua, ʦħən wən*ħi, *əŋ *o~u~unrən, pan *ianər, ħo~u~uaŋ ɾiŋna, ** tamɬ~ɮaw ko~u paɬ~ɮamaat itija. maɾaħəʦi na kab~vas takistao~u~uɾan aʦi ɬ~ɮanab~v pakikəɾi ko~u piro~utaro~ut to~u waʡaj no~u ʡəfa a fo~uɬ~ɮawan, səfat ħananajto~u to~u waja i taŋaɾ no~u ʡəfa, o~uja parakataj to~u paɾiɬ~ɮiŋ miɬ~ɮamaaj a matajaɾaj no~u minʦintan ʦi *əŋ *o~u~unrən ko~u mitaro~uħaj itija, nano~uja ɾaħəʦi sanajto~u mapo~uɾin ko~uja fo~uɬ~ɮawan. iko~ur no~unini a ɬ~ɮəmak, ʦi ɾin *o~uŋ*ħəŋ ato~u papinapina mikiħatijaaj to~unini a ɬ~ɮəmak mapako~ukso~u, nika iko~ur to~u maɾasawaɬ~ɮaj ko~u kaʦirarawan. minanamaj no~u o~u~urm, saki ɬ~ɮəmak to~uni a fo~uɬ~ɮawan faʦo~u ni wo~u~ufo~uŋ o~u katataħiʦan no~u jinʦo~u~umin ato~u pajraŋ a piɬ~ɮəmak, saki kaɾəkatəpan saki sinkako~u pito~uo~uran a ɬ~ɮəmak. iraaj ko~u "maɾəkapo~utaj ħaratəŋ" itira to~unini kaʡajaw siataw no~u ʦiɾamaɾaj, paʦəɾak paħapinaŋ to~u misamaŋaħan no~u miʦaɾapaj miko~uwan to~u sapipakaɬ~ɮit to~u jinʦo~u~umin a kawasan a ɬ~ɮəmak, kao~u mo~uʡəʦəɾaj ko~u sapiɾijaŋ to~u mitəkəɬ~ɮaj sako~uwan pakajni i piɬ~ɮəmak ato~u kiwiko~u ko~u piəpəʦ ato~u pisamsam to~u jinʦo~u~umin a so~uʡəɾinaj ɬ~ɮəmak. o~u piɬ~ɮəmak to~u fo~uɬ~ɮawan faʦo~u ni wo~u~ufo~uŋ o~u paħapinaŋaj to~u so~uʡəɾinaj, miɬ~ɮəmakaj to~u mo~uʡəʦəɾaj, kasasiŋo~uɬ~ɮo~u no~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan, patirəŋ to~u kaɾaɾiʡaj no~u ɬ~ɮəmak. pakajni i ɬ~ɮəmak no~u fo~uɬ~ɮawan faʦo~u ni wo~u~ufo~uŋ ko~u piħapiw no~u finawɾan no~u tajan, o~u nika əʦa naŋra i ʦaajaj ko~u mo~uʡəʦəɾaj ko~u ɬ~ɮəmak no~u ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj mirajraj to~u ɾikisi ko~uni. iko~ur to~u piɬ~ɮəmak to~uni a fo~uɬ~ɮawan faʦo~u ni wo~u~ufo~uŋ a ko~umintaŋ sifo~u saka, o~u paʦiʡʦian ko~u pipaʦaʡo~uf to~u niɾaħaan no~u jinʦo~u~umin, saka to~usa miħəʦa o~uja ko~uɾi pinjiko~uwan paɾasawaɬ~ɮan to~u nai sapikiwiko~u ko~uja kimaɬ~ɮ ni wo~u~ufo~uŋ, o~uja saɾaɾo~umaʡan ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj (niʦənpo~u) nao~u "wo~u~ufo~uŋsiaŋ" faɾiʦan paɾa "aɾisansiaŋ" sanaj to~u. o~u ninianan ko~u niħajɬ~ɮaan no~u ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj miko~uwan itija to~u pasimo~uʡəʦəɾaj ħaratəŋ ko~u pasajraan. patirəŋ to~u maŋaħaj ɾikisi ato~u paɾakawasan a wo~u~ufo~uŋ mapo~uɾin ato~u mapəɾəŋ to~u, matija o~u kapaʦək ni jis kristo~u i ʦiwʦika, mapəɾəŋ ko~u kaɾaɾaəɬ~ɮan no~u jinʦo~u~umin ato~u pajraŋ, kasasiʡaɬ~ɮa a paɬ~ɮaɾ. mapaɾasawaɬ~ɮ ko~u fo~uɬ~ɮawan ni wo~u~ufo~uŋ saka pasajra i maɾaʦəʦajaj ko~u jinʦo~u~umin ato~u pajraŋ, matija kaɾəkapo~ut no~u maɾikakaaj a aro~uʡ. pakajni piɬ~ɮəmak no~u o~u~urm, miħapiw ko~u ʦiwɾo~u kiwkaj, o~u mamiɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~u ko~u kiwkaj to~u pipasifanaʡ ni jis to~u rato~uħ no~u kawas, miħajɬ~ɮa to~u maʡəpəʦaj a iɾawaʦaj tamɬ~ɮaw, mapao~uniŋaj ŋaŋan a jinʦo~u~umin, maʦəfisaj saɾo~uŋo~uʦ ɾakapo~ut no~u finawɾan, maɾakapo~ut a ro~umakat. o~u saso~uwaɾən to~u piɾaħəʦiaw no~u tajwan kristo~u iwɾo~u kiwkaj to~u "kiwkaj*. o~u paɾaɾiʡajaj a mataħiɬ~ɮaŋ, * miħajɬ~ɮa to~u po~uɾo~uŋ no~u finawɾan, pakajni pio~uɾaħ ato~u kafaɬ~ɮəs, maɾakaʦipinaŋan no~u pafaɾo~uʦo~uʡan" a ɬ~ɮəmak no~u waʦaj a mito~uo~ur o~u sanaj a "piɬ~ɮəmak to~u fo~uɬ~ɮawan faʦo~u ni wo~u~ufo~uŋ". mitiɾiɬ~ɮaj ʦi ʦħən nan*ħo~uo~u~u mifaɾiʦaj ʦi masao~u nikar
S.FORM: == Pidemak to fodawan faco ni Wufong == Pidemak to fodawan faco ni Wufong sanay o naitiniay i 1988 miheca 12 folad 31 romi'ad, mapatirengay ka'ayaw no cilamalay no Ciayi a fodawan faco ni Wufong, mapolin no URM (Urban-Rural Mission) onto no yicumin a demakan. Wufong, pirocok to sowal o nano "pacayatay" no Mancin i kasaniyaro' no Cayi itiya, o sasowalen o mihongyakoay tamdaw, kasasowalan to sakicitodongay. Pikowan no Dipong to Taywan itiya to sapi "palatamdaw a satao'" i, nonini ci Wufong tamdaw a nidemakan palakawasen nanay, mala o mipalasawaday to tatiih no Cozoku a militangalay saka mikinafalahay to tireng a tadamaanay tamdaw hanto. Padoedo o papotalay Congko komintang ko mikowanay to Taywan itiya i, o sapilaheciaw to "palatamdaw (keihatsu)" to yincumin pisafaloco', oya nisakawasan a demak ni Wufong, pacomoden i tilid no kaemangay, oya kamaro'an no Cozoku finawlan a ngangan palaWufongsiangen. Oya kasakapot no sangasaw i Ciayi patireng to odawan faco ni Wufong, mapatireng i ka'ayaw syataw no Ciayi, kalo pica'engawan no tamdaw o "kahorak mingodo" yo sanay. O sakadademak no micalapay mikowan ato pisakakinih to ponka ko ni Wufong a pisakawas, palemangahen no mikowanay o mikinafalahay to tireng sanay palakawas ci Wufongan koya fodawan faco, o sapioning to kacingangan no yincumin, milokes ato miepecay to yincumin ato ponka konini a kacipinang a silosi; saka o makataray, mifolaway, komaenay to remes ko finacadan no yincumin sanay. I 1980 miheca macakat to ko harateng no yincumin to sakacinikapolongan a Taywan, matapi'elalay, nanoya micowat to ko onto no yincumin. Mi'oningay to yincumin a nisakawasan ci Wufongan a likisi kahinapecen to no hakasi ato yincuminco salongoc a yofayof, onini sakawasan Wufong malopakayraan a miliyang no yincumin. I 1988 miheca 12 folad, o patodongan nonini a paratohay onto (Urban-Rural Mission, URM) o "Pikihar to maepecay safaay finacadan ato lawacay tamdaw a ma'oripay, o olah ato caayay ko nifolawan pidemak, nai finawlanay sarikec, milaheciay to saka mo'ecel ato nipitelek no niyah a syakay", itini i Kopi kiwkay a Sinhua no Taynan minanam saka 9 lekad a konling, mikihatiyaay minanam saheto o dingtosi no yincumin ato mitiliday no Yusan sinkakoing. Pasifanaay singsi ira ci Zheng Guozhong aci Lin Zongzheng i "pilaheci to demak no syakay" a kasasowalen, ira ko picecayay a mitiliday to sinkakoing ci Pasuya Tiakiana painiay to itiraay ka'ayaway no cilamalay siataw no Ciayi a fodawan faco ni Wufong, pipeleng to nisakawasan a Wufong sarocoday a pidemak, malokaainian no pinanam. Toya dafak i 12 folad 31 romi'ad romi'ad, o nikeridan ni Lin Zongzheng foksi a minanamay no URM, tayra i ka'ayaway no cilamalay siataw no Ciayi a fodawan faco ni Wufong. O nipidemak nai ci Lin Zongzheng foksi ko misa'osiay to kapolongan nitelek no yincumin a "Pidemak to fodawan faco ni Wufong" demak no pihapiw. Sa'ayaway a pidemak i tanetek k katomirengan noya fodawan 'efa, caay kafilo tarohen koya fodawan. Itiya to i saka tosa ko pitaroh a demak, oya Bunun a tamdaw ci Kavas Takistaulan aci Danav Pakikeli mikalic nai koror ni 'Amis a tamdaw ci Masao Nikar, macakat i katomirengan noya fodawan ni Wufong a mirotarotay, oya roma a kapot o Cozoku tamdaw ci Pasuya Tiakiana, Bunun tamdaw ci Tiang Qulmutan, Paiwan tamdaw ci Ripun, Ngedrel, Chen Xiongshu aci DremdremanTjausunug, Tayal tamdaw ci Tuau Yugehai, Laysa Akyo aci Yukuy Watan, ato ci Lin Zongzheng, Huang Zhaokai, Dai Zhenyao, Liu Fengsong, Zhan Yihua, Chen Wenzhi, Zeng Junren, Pan Jianer, Huang Lingna, 30 tamdaw ko padamaat itiya. malaheci na Kavas Takistaulan aci Danav Pakikeli ko pirotarot to wa'ay no 'efa a fodawan, sefat hananayto to waya i tangal no 'efa, oya parakatay to paliding midamaay a matayalay no mincintan ci Zeng Junren ko mitarohay itiya, nanoya laheci sanayto mapolin koya fodawan. Ikor nonini a demak, ci Lin Zongzheng ato papinapina mikihatiyaay tonini a demak mapakokso, nika ikor to malasawaday ko kacirarawan. Minanamay no URM, saki demak toni a fodawan faco ni Wufong o katatahican no yincumin ato Payrang a pidemak, saki kalekatepan saki sinkako pitooran a demak. iraay ko "malekapotay harateng" itira tonini ka'ayaw siataw no cilamalay, pacelak pahapinang to misamangahan no micalapay mikowan to sapipakadit to yincumin a kawasan a demak, kao mo'ecelay ko sapiliyang to mitekeday sakowan pakayni i pidemak ato kiwiko ko piepec ato pisamsam to yincumin a so'elinay demak. O pidemak to fodawan faco ni Wufong o pahapinangay to so'elinay, midemakay to mo'ecelay, kasasingodo no finacadan, patireng to kalali'ay no demak. Pakayni i demak no fodawan faco ni Wufong ko pihapiw no finawlan no Tayan, o nika eca nangra i caayay ko mo'ecelay ko demak no citodongay mirayray to likisi koni. ikor to pidemak toni a fodawan faco ni Wufong a komintang sifo saka, o paci'cian ko pipaca'of to nilahaan no yincumin, saka tosa miheca oya Koli pinyikowan palasawadan to nai sapikiwiko koya kimad ni Wufong, oya salaloma'an citodongay (Nicenpo) nao "Wufongsiang" falican pala "Alisansiang" sanay to. O ninianan ko nihaydaan no citodongay mikowan itiya to pasimo'ecelay harateng ko pasayraan. Patireng to mangahay likisi ato palakawasan a Wufong mapolin ato mapeleng to, matiya o kapacek ni Yis Kristo i ciwcika, mapeleng ko kalalaedan no yincumin ato Payrang, kasasi'ada a padal. Mapalasawad ko fodawan ni Wufong saka pasayra i malacecayay ko yincumin ato Payrang, matiya kalekapot no malikakaay a aro'. Pakayni pidemak no URM, mihapiw ko ciwlo kiwkay, o mamidoedo ko kiwkay to pipasifana' ni Yis to ratoh no Kawas, mihayda to ma'epecay a ilawacay tamdaw, mapaoningay ngangan a yincumin, macefisay salongoc lakapot no finawlan, malakapot a romakat. O sasowalen to pilaheciaw no Taywan Kristo iwlo kiwkay to "kiwkay…. o palali'ayay a matahidang, … mihayda to polong no finawlan, pakayni piolah ato kafades, malakacipinangan no pafaloco'an" a demak no wacay a mitoor o sanay a "Pidemak to fodawan faco ni Wufong". Mitiliday ci Chen Nanzhou Mifalicay ci Masao Nikar
S.PHON: == piɬ~ɮəmak to~u fo~uɬ~ɮawan faʦo~u ni wo~u~ufo~uŋ == piɬ~ɮəmak to~u fo~uɬ~ɮawan faʦo~u ni wo~u~ufo~uŋ sanaj o~u naitiniaj i **** miħəʦa ** fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, mapatirəŋaj kaʡajaw no~u ʦiɾamaɾaj no~u ʦiaji a fo~uɬ~ɮawan faʦo~u ni wo~u~ufo~uŋ, mapo~uɾin no~u o~u~urm (o~u~urb~b~van-ro~u~uraɾ missio~un) o~unto~u no~u jiʦo~u~umin a ɬ~ɮəmakan. wo~u~ufo~uŋ, piro~uʦo~uk to~u so~uwaɾ o~u nano~u "paʦajataj" no~u manʦin i kasanijaro~uʡ no~u ʦaji itija, o~u saso~uwaɾən o~u miħo~uŋjako~uaj tamɬ~ɮaw, kasaso~uwaɾan to~u sakiʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj. piko~uwan no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ to~u tajwan itija to~u sapi "paɾatamɬ~ɮaw a satao~uʡ" i, no~unini ʦi wo~u~ufo~uŋ tamɬ~ɮaw a niɬ~ɮəmakan paɾakawasən nanaj, maɾa o~u mipaɾasawaɬ~ɮaj to~u tatiiħ no~u ʦo~u*o~uko~u~u a miɾitaŋaɾaj saka mikinafaɾaħaj to~u tirəŋ a taɬ~ɮamaanaj tamɬ~ɮaw ħanto~u. paɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~u o~u papo~utaɾaj ʦo~uŋko~u ko~umintaŋ ko~u miko~uwanaj to~u tajwan itija i, o~u sapiɾaħəʦiaw to~u "paɾatamɬ~ɮaw (kəiħatso~u~u)" to~u jinʦo~u~umin pisafaɾo~uʦo~uʡ, o~uja nisakawasan a ɬ~ɮəmak ni wo~u~ufo~uŋ, paʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮən i tiɾiɬ~ɮ no~u kaəmaŋaj, o~uja kamaro~uʡan no~u ʦo~u*o~uko~u~u finawɾan a ŋaŋan paɾawo~u~ufo~uŋsiaŋən. o~uja kasakapo~ut no~u saŋasaw i ʦiaji patirəŋ to~u o~uɬ~ɮawan faʦo~u ni wo~u~ufo~uŋ, mapatirəŋ i kaʡajaw sjataw no~u ʦiaji, kaɾo~u piʦaʡəŋawan no~u tamɬ~ɮaw o~u "kaħo~urak miŋo~uɬ~ɮo~u" jo~u sanaj. o~u sakaɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəmak no~u miʦaɾapaj miko~uwan ato~u pisakakiniħ to~u po~unka ko~u ni wo~u~ufo~uŋ a pisakawas, paɾəmaŋaħən no~u miko~uwanaj o~u mikinafaɾaħaj to~u tirəŋ sanaj paɾakawas ʦi wo~u~ufo~uŋan ko~uja fo~uɬ~ɮawan faʦo~u, o~u sapio~uniŋ to~u kaʦiŋaŋan no~u jinʦo~u~umin, miɾo~ukəs ato~u miəpəʦaj to~u jinʦo~u~umin ato~u po~unka ko~unini a kaʦipinaŋ a siɾo~usi; saka o~u makataraj, mifo~uɾawaj, ko~umaənaj to~u rəməs ko~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan no~u jinʦo~u~umin sanaj. i **** miħəʦa maʦakat to~u ko~u ħaratəŋ no~u jinʦo~u~umin to~u sakaʦinikapo~uɾo~uŋan a tajwan, matapiʡəɾaɾaj, nano~uja miʦo~uwat to~u ko~u o~unto~u no~u jinʦo~u~umin. miʡo~uniŋaj to~u jinʦo~u~umin a nisakawasan ʦi wo~u~ufo~uŋan a ɾikisi kaħinapəʦən to~u no~u ħakasi ato~u jinʦo~u~uminʦo~u saɾo~uŋo~uʦ a jo~ufajo~uf, o~unini sakawasan wo~u~ufo~uŋ maɾo~upakajraan a miɾijaŋ no~u jinʦo~u~umin. i **** miħəʦa ** fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ, o~u pato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋan no~unini a parato~uħaj o~unto~u (o~u~urb~b~van-ro~u~uraɾ missio~un, o~u~urm) o~u "pikiħar to~u maəpəʦaj safaaj finaʦaɬ~ɮan ato~u ɾawaʦaj tamɬ~ɮaw a maʡo~uripaj, o~u o~uɾaħ ato~u ʦaajaj ko~u nifo~uɾawan piɬ~ɮəmak, nai finawɾanaj sarikəʦ, miɾaħəʦiaj to~u saka mo~uʡəʦəɾ ato~u nipitəɾək no~u nijaħ a sjakaj", itini i ko~upi kiwkaj a sinħo~u~ua no~u tajnan minanam saka * ɾəkaɬ~ɮ a ko~unɾiŋ, mikiħatijaaj minanam saħəto~u o~u ɬ~ɮiŋto~usi no~u jinʦo~u~umin ato~u mitiɾiɬ~ɮaj no~u jo~u~usan sinkako~uiŋ. pasifanaaj siŋsi ira ʦi *ħəŋ *o~u~uo~u*ħo~uŋ aʦi ɾin *o~uŋ*ħəŋ i "piɾaħəʦi to~u ɬ~ɮəmak no~u sjakaj" a kasaso~uwaɾən, ira ko~u piʦəʦajaj a mitiɾiɬ~ɮaj to~u sinkako~uiŋ ʦi paso~u~uja tiakiana painiaj to~u itiraaj kaʡajawaj no~u ʦiɾamaɾaj siataw no~u ʦiaji a fo~uɬ~ɮawan faʦo~u ni wo~u~ufo~uŋ, pipəɾəŋ to~u nisakawasan a wo~u~ufo~uŋ saro~uʦo~uɬ~ɮaj a piɬ~ɮəmak, maɾo~ukaainian no~u pinanam. to~uja ɬ~ɮafak i ** fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, o~u nikəriɬ~ɮan ni ɾin *o~uŋ*ħəŋ fo~uksi a minanamaj no~u o~u~urm, tajra i kaʡajawaj no~u ʦiɾamaɾaj siataw no~u ʦiaji a fo~uɬ~ɮawan faʦo~u ni wo~u~ufo~uŋ. o~u nipiɬ~ɮəmak nai ʦi ɾin *o~uŋ*ħəŋ fo~uksi ko~u misaʡo~usiaj to~u kapo~uɾo~uŋan nitəɾək no~u jinʦo~u~umin a "piɬ~ɮəmak to~u fo~uɬ~ɮawan faʦo~u ni wo~u~ufo~uŋ" ɬ~ɮəmak no~u piħapiw. saʡajawaj a piɬ~ɮəmak i tanətək k kato~umirəŋan no~uja fo~uɬ~ɮawan ʡəfa, ʦaaj kafiɾo~u taro~uħən ko~uja fo~uɬ~ɮawan. itija to~u i saka to~usa ko~u pitaro~uħ a ɬ~ɮəmak, o~uja b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un a tamɬ~ɮaw ʦi kab~vas takistao~u~uɾan aʦi ɬ~ɮanab~v pakikəɾi mikaɾiʦ nai ko~uro~ur ni ʡamis a tamɬ~ɮaw ʦi masao~u nikar, maʦakat i kato~umirəŋan no~uja fo~uɬ~ɮawan ni wo~u~ufo~uŋ a miro~utaro~utaj, o~uja ro~uma a kapo~ut o~u ʦo~u*o~uko~u~u tamɬ~ɮaw ʦi paso~u~uja tiakiana, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un tamɬ~ɮaw ʦi tiaŋ *o~u~uɾmo~u~utan, paiwan tamɬ~ɮaw ʦi ripo~u~un, ŋəɬ~ɮrəɾ, ʦħən xio~uŋsħo~u~u aʦi ɬ~ɮrəmɬ~ɮrəmantjao~u~uso~u~uno~u~u*, tajaɾ tamɬ~ɮaw ʦi to~u~uao~u~u jo~u~u*əħai, ɾajsa akjo~u aʦi jo~u~uko~u~uj watan, ato~u ʦi ɾin *o~uŋ*ħəŋ, ħo~u~uaŋ *ħao~ukai, ɬ~ɮai *ħənjao~u, ɾio~u~u fəŋso~uŋ, *ħan jiħo~u~ua, ʦħən wən*ħi, *əŋ *o~u~unrən, pan *ianər, ħo~u~uaŋ ɾiŋna, ** tamɬ~ɮaw ko~u paɬ~ɮamaat itija. maɾaħəʦi na kab~vas takistao~u~uɾan aʦi ɬ~ɮanab~v pakikəɾi ko~u piro~utaro~ut to~u waʡaj no~u ʡəfa a fo~uɬ~ɮawan, səfat ħananajto~u to~u waja i taŋaɾ no~u ʡəfa, o~uja parakataj to~u paɾiɬ~ɮiŋ miɬ~ɮamaaj a matajaɾaj no~u minʦintan ʦi *əŋ *o~u~unrən ko~u mitaro~uħaj itija, nano~uja ɾaħəʦi sanajto~u mapo~uɾin ko~uja fo~uɬ~ɮawan. iko~ur no~unini a ɬ~ɮəmak, ʦi ɾin *o~uŋ*ħəŋ ato~u papinapina mikiħatijaaj to~unini a ɬ~ɮəmak mapako~ukso~u, nika iko~ur to~u maɾasawaɬ~ɮaj ko~u kaʦirarawan. minanamaj no~u o~u~urm, saki ɬ~ɮəmak to~uni a fo~uɬ~ɮawan faʦo~u ni wo~u~ufo~uŋ o~u katataħiʦan no~u jinʦo~u~umin ato~u pajraŋ a piɬ~ɮəmak, saki kaɾəkatəpan saki sinkako~u pito~uo~uran a ɬ~ɮəmak. iraaj ko~u "maɾəkapo~utaj ħaratəŋ" itira to~unini kaʡajaw siataw no~u ʦiɾamaɾaj, paʦəɾak paħapinaŋ to~u misamaŋaħan no~u miʦaɾapaj miko~uwan to~u sapipakaɬ~ɮit to~u jinʦo~u~umin a kawasan a ɬ~ɮəmak, kao~u mo~uʡəʦəɾaj ko~u sapiɾijaŋ to~u mitəkəɬ~ɮaj sako~uwan pakajni i piɬ~ɮəmak ato~u kiwiko~u ko~u piəpəʦ ato~u pisamsam to~u jinʦo~u~umin a so~uʡəɾinaj ɬ~ɮəmak. o~u piɬ~ɮəmak to~u fo~uɬ~ɮawan faʦo~u ni wo~u~ufo~uŋ o~u paħapinaŋaj to~u so~uʡəɾinaj, miɬ~ɮəmakaj to~u mo~uʡəʦəɾaj, kasasiŋo~uɬ~ɮo~u no~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan, patirəŋ to~u kaɾaɾiʡaj no~u ɬ~ɮəmak. pakajni i ɬ~ɮəmak no~u fo~uɬ~ɮawan faʦo~u ni wo~u~ufo~uŋ ko~u piħapiw no~u finawɾan no~u tajan, o~u nika əʦa naŋra i ʦaajaj ko~u mo~uʡəʦəɾaj ko~u ɬ~ɮəmak no~u ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj mirajraj to~u ɾikisi ko~uni. iko~ur to~u piɬ~ɮəmak to~uni a fo~uɬ~ɮawan faʦo~u ni wo~u~ufo~uŋ a ko~umintaŋ sifo~u saka, o~u paʦiʡʦian ko~u pipaʦaʡo~uf to~u niɾaħaan no~u jinʦo~u~umin, saka to~usa miħəʦa o~uja ko~uɾi pinjiko~uwan paɾasawaɬ~ɮan to~u nai sapikiwiko~u ko~uja kimaɬ~ɮ ni wo~u~ufo~uŋ, o~uja saɾaɾo~umaʡan ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj (niʦənpo~u) nao~u "wo~u~ufo~uŋsiaŋ" faɾiʦan paɾa "aɾisansiaŋ" sanaj to~u. o~u ninianan ko~u niħajɬ~ɮaan no~u ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj miko~uwan itija to~u pasimo~uʡəʦəɾaj ħaratəŋ ko~u pasajraan. patirəŋ to~u maŋaħaj ɾikisi ato~u paɾakawasan a wo~u~ufo~uŋ mapo~uɾin ato~u mapəɾəŋ to~u, matija o~u kapaʦək ni jis kristo~u i ʦiwʦika, mapəɾəŋ ko~u kaɾaɾaəɬ~ɮan no~u jinʦo~u~umin ato~u pajraŋ, kasasiʡaɬ~ɮa a paɬ~ɮaɾ. mapaɾasawaɬ~ɮ ko~u fo~uɬ~ɮawan ni wo~u~ufo~uŋ saka pasajra i maɾaʦəʦajaj ko~u jinʦo~u~umin ato~u pajraŋ, matija kaɾəkapo~ut no~u maɾikakaaj a aro~uʡ. pakajni piɬ~ɮəmak no~u o~u~urm, miħapiw ko~u ʦiwɾo~u kiwkaj, o~u mamiɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~u ko~u kiwkaj to~u pipasifanaʡ ni jis to~u rato~uħ no~u kawas, miħajɬ~ɮa to~u maʡəpəʦaj a iɾawaʦaj tamɬ~ɮaw, mapao~uniŋaj ŋaŋan a jinʦo~u~umin, maʦəfisaj saɾo~uŋo~uʦ ɾakapo~ut no~u finawɾan, maɾakapo~ut a ro~umakat. o~u saso~uwaɾən to~u piɾaħəʦiaw no~u tajwan kristo~u iwɾo~u kiwkaj to~u "kiwkaj*. o~u paɾaɾiʡajaj a mataħiɬ~ɮaŋ, * miħajɬ~ɮa to~u po~uɾo~uŋ no~u finawɾan, pakajni pio~uɾaħ ato~u kafaɬ~ɮəs, maɾakaʦipinaŋan no~u pafaɾo~uʦo~uʡan" a ɬ~ɮəmak no~u waʦaj a mito~uo~ur o~u sanaj a "piɬ~ɮəmak to~u fo~uɬ~ɮawan faʦo~u ni wo~u~ufo~uŋ". mitiɾiɬ~ɮaj ʦi ʦħən nan*ħo~uo~u~u mifaɾiʦaj ʦi masao~u nikar
